# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a Python data processing application. Start from a full Ubuntu base image and install Python, pip, curl, wget, git, vim, and other useful development tools. This gives us flexibility for debugging and running various scripts in production.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:latest

# Install Python and its dependencies
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y python3 python3-pip curl wget git vim && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set the working directory to /app
WORKDIR /app

# Copy the requirements file
COPY requirements.txt .

# Install any specified packages in the requirements file
RUN pip install -r requirements.txt

# Expose port 80 for HTTP traffic
EXPOSE 80

# Run the Flask development server
CMD ["python", "app.py"]
